## Test plan

<!-- How did you verify this? Check what applies. -->

- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] `pnpm e2e` passes (if user-facing flows changed)
- [ ] Typecheck clean (`pnpm --filter @productmap/api exec tsc --noEmit`, web equivalent)
- [ ] Manually verified in the running app

## Checklist

- [ ] Follows existing patterns and conventions
- [ ] Added/updated tests for new behavior
- [ ] Updated docs / README if behavior or setup changed
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or unrelated changes included
